_meta.description: Roundtable pricing fallback data. Gate fetches this file at runtime (stale-while-revalidate) and stores it in localStorage. Atlas reads the stored PricingTable at send time to compute per-message cost estimates.
_meta.schema: PricingTable — keys are exact API-level model strings sent to provider endpoints. Values are PricingEntry { inputPer1M, outputPer1M }.
unverifiedEstimates: o1-mini — input $3.00, output $12.00 derived from 2025 pricing; verify at openai.com/api/pricing before relying on this figure
open-mistral-nemo — output $0.02 assumed symmetric with input; verify at mistral.ai/pricing

notes.grok-3: Retired by xAI on May 15 2026; API alias silently redirects to grok-4.3, billed at $1.25/$2.50 (the prices recorded here).
notes.grok-3-mini: Deprecated; API alias silently redirects to grok-4.3, billed at $1.25/$2.50 (the prices recorded here).
notes.grok-2: Deprecated; API alias silently redirects to grok-4.3, billed at $1.25/$2.50 (the prices recorded here).
notes.gemini-2.0-flash: Scheduled for shutdown June 2026; model string kept in registry for backwards compatibility. Pricing may no longer apply.
notes.deepseek-chat: Compatibility alias for DeepSeek V4 Flash; alias scheduled for removal 2026-07-24. Prices reflect V4 Flash standard (non-cached) input rate.
notes.deepseek-reasoner: Compatibility alias for DeepSeek V4 Pro; alias scheduled for removal 2026-07-24. Prices reflect V4 Pro standard (non-cached) input rate.
